name: Wii U
description: Nintendo's HD home console platform built around the GamePad, asymmetric play, and early HD entries for major Nintendo franchises.

eras.title: GamePad Experiment Era
eras.description: Early period focused on asymmetric play, dual-screen ideas, and HD transitions for Nintendo franchises.

eras.title: Switch Blueprint Era
eras.description: Late period where Splatoon, Mario Maker, Mario Kart 8, and Breath of the Wild preview Nintendo's Switch-era direction.
